title: docs: fix build tool tutorial with correct modules
body:
<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read and understood our contributing guidelines
(https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) as well as ensuring
that all your commits are signed with `git commit -s`.
-->

#### What type of PR is this?

<!--
Please label this pull request according to what type of issue you are
addressing, especially if this is a release targeted pull request.

Uncomment only one `/kind <>` line, hit enter to put that in a new line, and
remove leading whitespace from that line:
-->

> /kind api-change
> /kind bug
> /kind cleanup
> /kind deprecation
> /kind design
/kind documentation
> /kind failing-test 
> /kind feature
> /kind flake
> /kind other

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

use go modules from go.podman.io, not github.com/containers/...

otherwise the following error message shows up:
```
./main.go:46:53: cannot use buildStore (variable of interface type "github.com/containers/storage".Store) as "go.podman.io/storage".Store value in argument to buildah.NewBuilder: "github.com/containers/storage".Store does not implement "go.podman.io/storage".Store (wrong type for method ApplyStagedLayer)
		have ApplyStagedLayer("github.com/containers/storage".ApplyStagedLayerOptions) (*"github.com/containers/storage".Layer, error)
		want ApplyStagedLayer("go.podman.io/storage".ApplyStagedLayerOptions) (*"go.podman.io/storage".Layer, error)
./main.go:74:55: cannot use imageRef (variable of type *"github.com/containers/image/v5/storage".storageReference) as "go.podman.io/image/v5/types".ImageReference value in argument to builder.Commit: *"github.com/containers/image/v5/storage".storageReference does not implement "go.podman.io/image/v5/types".ImageReference (wrong type for method DeleteImage)
		have DeleteImage(context.Context, *"github.com/containers/image/v5/types".SystemContext) error
		want DeleteImage(context.Context, *"go.podman.io/image/v5/types".SystemContext) error
```

#### How to verify it

Copy the code into a `main.go`, do:
* `go mod tidy`
* `go build`

ensure no errors shows up

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

<!--
Automatically closes linked issue when PR is merged.

number or None on one line.
Usage: `Fixes #<issue number>`, or `Fixes (paste link of issue)`, or `None`.
-->

<!--

or
None
-->

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?


No, only the developer documentation changes.
